# Spire Group Inc.
> Clinical SaaS and AI healthcare platform development firm based in Las Vegas, Nevada.

## About
Spire Group Inc. designs, builds, and operates AI-powered clinical and healthcare SaaS platforms. We specialize in multi-stakeholder clinical systems requiring HIPAA-aware architecture, AI integration, provider credentialing, mobile-first delivery, and autonomous agent systems.

## Key Facts
- Based in Las Vegas, Nevada
- Five production platforms built and deployed
- Patent-pending clinical technology (filed with USPTO)
- Live production platform: Aesthetics To Go (aestheticstogo.com)
- Seven-agent autonomous acquisition system in daily operation

## Capabilities
- Clinical Platform Architecture: HIPAA-aware, multi-stakeholder systems
- AI & Medical Intelligence: procedure simulation, medical AI assistants, treatment recommendations
- Mobile Apps: cross-platform patient and provider applications
- Scheduling & Route Optimization: smart scheduling for mobile clinical delivery
- Provider Credentialing & Compliance: NPI verification, license validation, consent management
- Autonomous Agent Systems: AI-powered acquisition and outreach pipelines
- EHR & SOAP Notes: purpose-built clinical documentation systems
- Clinical Operations Playbook: embedded SOPs, protocols, and training

- Website: https://spiregroupinc.com

- Location: Las Vegas, Nevada
